Principal ML Engineer

Gamma Fintech
Gurugram
₹50-70 LPA

We are building the next generation of credit risk models at Gamma Fintech. You will own the full ML lifecycle: data, training, evaluation, deployment, monitoring.

  • 5+ years building production ML systems
  • Deep familiarity with gradient boosting, time-series, causal inference
  • Mentorship experience

Comp: ₹50-70 LPA base + ESOPs. Hybrid 3 days per week from Gurugram.
